item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-34038 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-34038 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.9
Resumo:
Coolify is an open-source and self-hostable tool for managing servers, applications, and databases. Prior to 4.0.0-beta.469, an authenticated remote command injection vulnerability in application deployment handling allows users with application write permissions to achieve remote code execution and exfiltrate sensitive environment variables through deployment logs via fields such as dockerfile_location and deploymen...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34038

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-57573 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-57573 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
Crawl4AI is an open-source LLM-friendly web crawler and scraper. Prior to 0.9.0, the Docker API server applied its SSRF destination check on the non-streaming /crawl path but not on the streaming path. handle_stream_crawl_request passed seed URLs straight to the crawler with no destination validation, allowing a remote unauthenticated client to call POST /crawl/stream or POST /crawl with crawler_config.stream=true wi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57573

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-13020 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-13020 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
A Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password exists in Esri Portal for ArcGIS versions 12.1 and earlier on Windows, Linux and Kubernetes. A remote, unauthorized attacker may assume ownership of a user’s account by manipulating this mechanism. ArcGIS Administrators should configure an email server with ArcGIS Enterprise to facilitate user self-service password recovery. The ability for an administrator to...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13020

item.title: [Segurança] 15-Year-Old GhostLock Flaw Enables Root and Container Escape on Most Linux Distros
item.description:
🚨 15-Year-Old GhostLock Flaw Enables Root and Container Escape on Most Linux Distros
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Researchers at Nebula Security have disclosed GhostLock (CVE-2026-43499), a 15-year-old Linux kernel flaw that lets any logged-in user take full root control of a machine that has not been patched. The vulnerable code has shipped by default in essentially every mainstream distribution since 2011. The flaw needs no special permission, no unusual settings, and no network
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/15-year-old-ghostlock-flaw-enables-root.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Threat Actors Probe Gitea Docker Flaw CVE-2026-20896 13 Days After Disclosure - The Hacker News
item.description:

Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-12154 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-12154 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Reviews Widgets for Google, Yelp & TripAdvisor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'page_id' shortcode attribute of the [fbrev] shortcode in versions up to and including 2.7.3. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the Feed_Shortcode::fbrev() method, which passes the raw shortcode attribute through Feed_Old::get_feed() into the View::render() m...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12154

item.title: [Segurança] CISA Adds 4 Actively Exploited Adobe, Joomla, and Langflow Flaws to KEV
item.description:
🚨 CISA Adds 4 Actively Exploited Adobe, Joomla, and Langflow Flaws to KEV
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added four security flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-48282 (CVSS score: 10.0) - A path traversal vulnerability in Adobe ColdFusion that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/cisa-adds-4-actively-exploited-adobe.html

item.title: [Segurança] Ubiquiti Patches Critical UniFi Flaws Across Connect, Talk, Access, Protect, and OS
item.description:
🚨 Ubiquiti Patches Critical UniFi Flaws Across Connect, Talk, Access, Protect, and OS
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Ubiquiti has shipped updates to address multiple critical security flaws impacting UniFi Connect, UniFi Talk, UniFi Access, UniFi Protect, and UniFi OS that could result in privilege escalation and arbitrary command execution. The list of vulnerabilities is as follows - CVE-2026-50746 (CVSS score: 10.0) - An improper access control vulnerability in UniFi Connect Application that an attacker
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/ubiquiti-patches-critical-unifi-flaws.html

item.title: [Segurança] Ubiquiti warns of new max severity UniFi OS vulnerability
item.description:
💣 Ubiquiti warns of new max severity UniFi OS vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Ubiquiti has released security updates to patch seven critical vulnerabilities in UniFi OS, including a maximum-severity flaw that can be exploited in command injection attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ubiquiti-warns-of-new-max-severity-unifi-os-vulnerability/

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to prioritize patching Langflow auth bypass flaw
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to prioritize patching Langflow auth bypass flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) gave federal agencies until Friday to patch an actively exploited vulnerability in the Langflow visual framework for building AI agents.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-prioritize-patching-langflow-auth-bypass-flaw/

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch max severity ColdFusion flaw by Friday
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch max severity ColdFusion flaw by Friday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered government agencies to patch an actively exploited maximum-severity flaw in the Adobe ColdFusion commercial web app development platform by Friday.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-max-severity-coldfusion-flaw-by-friday/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8515-1: Addressable vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8515-1: Addressable vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Addressable incorrectly handled certain URI templates, generating regular expressions vulnerable to catastrophic backtracking. An attacker could use this issue to craft a URI that, when matched against a vulnerable template, causes excessive resource consumption, leading to a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8515-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Inside Audi’s Factory Transformation: What ARC’s Research Reveals
item.description:
📰 Inside Audi’s Factory Transformation: What ARC’s Research Reveals
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Rigid, hardware-bound PCs on legacy factory floors have long acted as a bottleneck for the electric vehicle transition. To eliminate these infrastructure constraints without risking costly downtime, Audi developed its Edge Cloud 4 Production (EC4P) architecture, built on VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) at the Edge. By deploying an on-premises private edge cloud, Audi completely decouples …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/07/08/inside-audis-factory-transformation-what-arcs-research-reveals/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Why the Banks of the Next Decade Must be Sovereign Supercomputers
item.description:
📰 Why the Banks of the Next Decade Must be Sovereign Supercomputers
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the world of finance, money is not just currency, it’s an elaborate digital information system tied to massive amounts of data used. Given the relationship between money and data, a bank or financial institution is fundamentally just a data processing engine at scale. And as these institutions compete and grow, they will no longer …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/why-the-banks-of-the-next-decade-must-be-sovereign-supercomputers/
